top_issues.title: Walmart OTIF dropped to 92.1% in Q1
top_issues.detail: Chargeback exposure tracking to $14.2M for the quarter against a $9.0M plan. Driver mix: 41% late-delivery, 28% short-ship, 18% paperwork. Retailer-compliance agent has flagged 318 at-risk shipments in the next 14 days.

top_issues.title: Aerosol line at Cincinnati at 96% utilization
top_issues.detail: Sole bottleneck for Household Care aerosols; six-week order book exceeds capacity by 7.4M cases. Production-scheduling agent recommends shifting two SKUs to co-packer COP-104 (Springfield, MO) at a $0.11 per case premium.

top_issues.title: Palm oil spot up 18% over 60 days
top_issues.detail: Indonesian export curbs lifting RBD palm-olein spot. Hedge coverage is 52% through end of Q3. Unrealized mark-to-market on existing positions is +$8.9M but unhedged exposure threatens $22M of Q3 gross margin if spot holds.
